title: bestClip - ComfyUI Setup + Image Generation + Audio Fix
description: ติดตั้ง ComfyUI + FLUX.1-schnell, แก้ไขภาพและเสียงในวิดีโอ

stories.title: Download FLUX.1-schnell-fp8 model (blocked: needs HF login)
stories.note: Blocked on user HuggingFace login. Pollinations.ai used as working alternative.

stories.title: Update generate_images.py with prompt system + Pollinations fallback
acceptanceCriteria: build_image_prompt() generates optimized prompts from script metadata
Pollinations.ai works as fallback when ComfyUI unavailable
ComfyUI FLUX.1 used as primary when available

stories.title: Fix audio compatibility in render_video.py
acceptanceCriteria: Audio bitrate increased to 192k for better compatibility
Final video has audible Thai speech

stories.title: Re-render complete video and verify all fixes
acceptanceCriteria: Video plays correctly in standard players
